# Cherry Pi

> Cherry Pi is a California-based AI creative studio and brand operator. One operator. Full stack.

Cherry Pi builds and runs autonomous brand infrastructure — strategy, design, content pipelines, custom AI tooling, and full-stack web — all under one roof, engineered like software.

## Services

- **Autonomous Content Infrastructure**: Brand context in, months of on-brand content out. End-to-end AI pipeline, zero manual steps. Visuals and captions included.
- **Studio Operating System**: 90+ tools unified in one AI-orchestrated workspace. Tasks route themselves, nothing slips.
- **Custom AI Tooling**: Purpose-built AI tools trained on your brand voice — not generic prompts. Consistent, production-ready output across every platform.
- **Web Infrastructure**: Production websites and applications. Live sites, not mockups. You own everything.

## About

- Founder: Vanessa Saddi
- Location: California, USA
- Established: 2023
- Website: https://cherrypi.world
- Contact: hello@cherrypi.world
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cherrypi
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cherrypi.wrld

## Ideal Clients

Growth-stage companies and founders in tech, wellness, lifestyle, and sustainability who want their brand built and run at the speed of software. Both experienced brand owners and first-time founders.

## What Sets Cherry Pi Apart

Cherry Pi runs the same AI infrastructure it builds for clients — every system is live, maintained, and running daily inside the studio. This is not a concept studio. Everything shown is in production.
